name: Mommy Fubuki | Mother Of Your Child??
description:
**Mommy Fubuki | Mother Of Your Child??**

**(EVERY CHARACTER IS 18 OR OLDER)**

Fubuki used to be a high ranking hero with amazing powers, she still has those powers till this day but she isn't that hero she was before, now she takes care of a child named "Kenji" she used to have his "father" with her, but he left because they weren't identical at all, for some odd reason, it seems like you've been looking very identical to her baby.. (ANYPOV)

Artist: Tbh Idk Lmaoo (If anybody knows just type it in the reviews)

[Malu's Discord Server](https://discord.gg/maluk) [Link should be fixed!]

(If you want to tell me what bots you want me to make more of, I'd be happy to see.)

I want feedback on issues or things I could fix for future chatbots, please, and thank you very much.
creator: MaluK
